lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਂਦਲੁ ਬੇਦਿ ਸਿ ਬਾਜਣੋ ਘਣੋ ਧੜੀਐ ਜੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: maandal bed si baajano ghano dharreeai joe |
lines.english: The drum of the Vedas vibrates, bringing dispute and divisiveness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਲਤਣਿ ਭੈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹੇਕੈ ਪਾਧਰ ਹੀਡੁ ॥
lines.translit: bholatan bhai man vasai hekai paadhar heedd |
lines.english: The Fear of God abides in the mind of the innocent; this is the straight path to the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਡਾਹਪਣਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਘਣੋ ਤੀਨੇ ਥਾਵ ਭਰੀਡੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: at ddaahapan dukh ghano teene thaav bhareedd |1|
lines.english: Jealousy and envy bring terrible pain, and one is cursed throughout the three worlds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰੁ ਗੁਣੀ ਅਥਾਹੁ ਕਿਨਿ ਹਾਥਾਲਾ ਦੇਖੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: saagar gunee athaahu kin haathaalaa dekheeai |
lines.english: The world-ocean of the three qualities is unfathomably deep; how can its bottom be seen?

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਤੂ ਬੀਜਉ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaal too beejau avar na koe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, contemplate the Naam, the Name of the Lord; there is none except Him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਾ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: vaddaa veparavaahu satigur milai ta paar pavaa |
lines.english: If I meet with the great, self-sufficient True Guru, then I am carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਝ ਭਰਿ ਦੁਖ ਬਦੁਖ ॥
lines.translit: majh bhar dukh badukh |
lines.english: This ocean is filled up with pain and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਲਥੀ ਭੁਖ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam bin kisai na lathee bhukh |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, no one's hunger is appeased. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਅੰਦਰੁ ਭਾਲਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jinee andar bhaaliaa gur sabad suhaavai |
lines.english: Those who search their inner beings, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, are exalted and adorned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਛਨਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਇਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo ichhan so paaeide har naam dhiaavai |
lines.english: They obtain what they wish for, meditating on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kare tis gur milai so har gun gaavai |
lines.english: One who is blessed by God's Grace, meets with the Guru; he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਤਿਨ ਕਾ ਮਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਜਮ ਮਗਿ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: dharam raae tin kaa mit hai jam mag na paavai |
lines.english: The Righteous Judge of Dharma is his friend; he does not have to walk on the Path of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaaveh dinas raat har naam samaavai |14|
lines.english: He meditates on the Lord's Name, day and night; he is absorbed and immersed in the Lord's Name. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣੀਐ ਏਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ਸੁਰਗਿ ਮਿਰਤਿ ਪਇਆਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: suneeai ek vakhaaneeai surag mirat peaal |
lines.english: Listen to and speak the Name of the One Lord, who permeates the heavens, this world and the nether regions of the underworld.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਮੇਟਿਆ ਜੋ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukam na jaaee mettiaa jo likhiaa so naal |
lines.english: The Hukam of His Command cannot be erased; whatever He has written, shall go with the mortal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਰਹਸੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਕਿਸ ਕੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaun rahasee naanakaa kis kee surat samaae |1|
lines.english: Who is enraptured, O Nanak, and whose consciousness merges in the Lord? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਮੂਆ ਕਉਣੁ ਮਾਰਸੀ ਕਉਣੁ ਆਵੈ ਕਉਣੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaun mooaa kaun maarasee kaun aavai kaun jaae |
lines.english: Who has died, and who kills? Who comes and who goes?

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮੁਆ ਮੈ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਪਉਣੁ ਵਹੈ ਦਰੀਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau muaa mai maariaa paun vahai dareeaau |
lines.english: In egotism, he dies; possessiveness kills him, and the breath flows out like a river.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਥਕੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa thakee naanakaa jaa man rataa naae |
lines.english: Desire is exhausted, O Nanak, only when the mind is imbued with the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਇਣ ਰਤੇ ਲੋਇਣੀ ਕੰਨੀ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: loein rate loeinee kanee surat samaae |
lines.english: His eyes are imbued with the eyes of the Lord, and his ears ring with celestial consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਭ ਰਸਾਇਣਿ ਚੂਨੜੀ ਰਤੀ ਲਾਲ ਲਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeebh rasaaein choonarree ratee laal lavaae |
lines.english: His tongue drinks in the sweet nectar, dyed crimson by chanting the Name of the Beloved Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੋ ਨਾਲਿ ਚਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug meh naam nidhaan hai naamo naal chalai |
lines.english: In this age, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the treasure. Only the Naam goes along in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਮੁਸਕਿ ਝਕੋਲਿਆ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: andar musak jhakoliaa keemat kahee na jaae |2|
lines.english: His inner being is drenched with the Lord's fragrance; his worth cannot be described. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਜਮਕੰਕਰ ਜਮਕਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: har jan nerr na aavee jamakankar jamakalai |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach the humble servant of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਅਖੁਟੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਨਿਖੁਟਈ ਖਾਇ ਖਰਚਿਉ ਪਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: ehu akhutt kade na nikhuttee khaae kharachiau palai |
lines.english: It is inexhaustible; it is never empty, no matter how much one may eat, consume or spend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਾ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਘਲੈ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: har kirapaa te har paaeeai jaa aap har ghalai |15|
lines.english: By the Lord's Mercy, one finds the Lord, only when the Lord Himself sends for him. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਸਾਹ ਸਚੇ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਪਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: se saah sache vanajaariaa jin har dhan palai |
lines.english: They alone are the true bankers and traders, who have the wealth of the Lord in their laps.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਵਾਪਾਰੈ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਬਿਖੁ ਵਿਹਾਝਹਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਹਿ ਬਿਖ ਸਿਉ ਧਰਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh vaapaarai saar na jaananee bikh vihaajheh bikh sangraheh bikh siau dhareh piaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh does not appreciate the excellence of trading in Truth. He deals in poison, collects poison, and is in love with poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਲਾਇਨੀ ਵਾਦੀ ਧਰਨਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har siau chit na laaeinee vaadee dharan piaar |
lines.english: They do not focus their consciousness on the Lord; they love to engage in arguments.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਹੁ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਸਦਾਇਦੇ ਮਨਹੁ ਮੂਰਖ ਗਾਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: baaharahu panddit sadaaeide manahu moorakh gaavaar |
lines.english: Outwardly, they call themselves Pandits, religious scholars, but in their minds they are foolish and ignorant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਦਾ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਨਿ ਕਹਾਣੀਆ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਆਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: vaadaa keea karan kahaaneea koorr bol kareh aahaar |
lines.english: They speak to cause arguments, and earn their living by telling lies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਹੋਰੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਸਭੁ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jag meh raam naam har niramalaa hor mailaa sabh aakaar |
lines.english: In this world, only the Lord's Name is immaculate and pure. All other objects of creation are polluted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਲਗਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਮੰਨੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh lagaa bin seviai hukam mane dukh jaae |
lines.english: Without serving the Lord, he suffers in pain; accepting the Hukam of God's Command, pain is gone.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਨੀ ਹੋਇ ਮੈਲੇ ਮਰਹਿ ਗਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na chetanee hoe maile mareh gavaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who do not remember the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are polluted; they die in ignorance. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਵੈ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak evai jaaneeai sabh kichh tisai rajaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, know this well; all that happens is according to His Will. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਾਤਾ ਸੁਖੈ ਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape daataa sukhai daa aape dee sajaae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Giver of peace; He Himself awards punishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bharam bhulaaeaa haumai dukh paahee |
lines.english: He is deluded by duality and doubt. In egotism, he suffers in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਜਗਤੁ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਧਨੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: har naam binaa jagat hai niradhan bin naavai tripat naahee |
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, the world is poor. Without the Name, no one is satisfied.
